text:
The first image fills me with a sense of anticipation and quiet curiosity. The emptiness of the modern glass-walled room is inviting yet impersonal, echoing the potential for collective human activity or solitary introspection. I feel aware of the constructed nature of social spaces.

The second image, with its vibrant display and engaging visuals, excites my intellectual curiosity. The R+D theme invokes thoughts on innovation and the ceaseless urge for progress. I feel as though I am on the threshold of discovery, invigorated by the spirit of experimentation and human creativity reflected in the exhibition.
